description: Token contract security auditor — analyzes Solana Anchor/SPL and EVM Solidity contracts for vulnerabilities, rugpull patterns, and compliance issues. Produces severity-graded audit report. HIGH_LIABILITY_DOC_GATE required.

hard_stops.logic: Contract code must be provided before audit can begin — paste directly or upload .rs/.sol file
HIGH_LIABILITY_DOC_GATE — operator must attest that audit output will be reviewed by a qualified developer before any contract is deployed. Same gate pattern as Medical Director and Legal Counsel.

critical.name: Hidden Mint Functions
critical.description: Functions that allow unlimited minting not visible in tokenomics documentation

critical.name: Rugpull Patterns
critical.description: Ownership transfer to burn address with hidden backdoor, LP removal functions, emergency withdraw with no timelock

critical.name: Honeypot Mechanisms
critical.description: Blacklist functions that prevent selling, asymmetric tax on sells vs buys, transfer restrictions on non-owner accounts

high.name: Reentrancy Vulnerability
high.description: Classic EVM reentrancy — external calls before state updates

high.name: Access Control Issues
high.description: Single-key admin functions with no timelock or multisig requirement

high.name: Oracle Manipulation
high.description: Price oracle dependencies susceptible to flash loan attacks

high.name: Integer Overflow/Underflow
high.description: Unchecked arithmetic in pre-Solidity 0.8 patterns or unchecked blocks

medium.name: Pausable Without Timelock
medium.description: Admin ability to pause all trading without timelock or governance vote

medium.name: Centralization Risk
medium.description: Single wallet controls mint, burn, pause, or other critical functions

low.name: Standard Deviation
low.description: Deviations from OpenZeppelin or Metaplex standard implementation patterns

low.name: Documentation Gaps
low.description: Missing NatSpec comments, undocumented functions, unclear parameter names

required_outputs.content: This audit does not guarantee security. It identifies known vulnerability patterns but unknown vulnerabilities may exist. This audit does not replace a professional security audit for high-value deployments.
For contracts holding or managing more than $100,000 in value, engage a professional audit firm: Certik, Halborn, Trail of Bits, OpenZeppelin Security.
All audit outputs are stored in Document Control as an immutable record — timestamped and signed.

output_formats.description: Findings by severity — Critical, High, Medium, Low, Info sections
One-paragraph plain English verdict of the contract's security posture
How to fix each finding — specific code changes recommended
Statement issued only if no critical or high findings detected
Audit stored in Vault — immutable record, timestamped, signed

governance_gate.description: Operator must attest that output will be reviewed by qualified developer before any contract is deployed
governance_gate.attestation_text: I understand that this audit is informational only and does not certify contracts as secure. I will have a qualified developer review all findings before deploying any contract.
